text: Step-5 remeasurement on JDK25 with 5x500ms warmup/measure: Chol 765.1 vs Breeze 828.5 (0.924x), LU 557.8 vs 646.9 (0.862x), Solve 539.3 vs 634.5 (0.850x). Prior 0.70/0.62 dips were load noise. Do not implement blocked Cholesky/LU in this arc: 8-14% gaps do not justify algorithm/pivot complexity.
